headline: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Signals Iran War Exit In 'Two Or Three Weeks' After Market Soars; 7 Stocks To Watch
summary: President Trump is eyeing an Iran war exit even if the Strait of Hormuz stays closed. Stocks soared, oil prices were mixed.

headline: Quanta Services to Host & Webcast its 2026 Investor Day
summary: As previously announced, Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) is hosting and webcasting its 2026 Investor Day from New York City on Tues., Mar. 31, 2026. Management intends to present certain information and engage in a question-and-answer discussion focused on the company's strategic initiatives and new long-term financial targets.
